query:
UPDATE
                amqp_trigger
            SET
                amqp_resource_path = $1,
                queue_name = $2,
                exchange = $3,
                options = $4,
                is_flow = $5,
                edited_by = $6,
                permissioned_as = $7,
                script_path = $8,
                path = $9,
                edited_at = now(),
                error = NULL,
                server_id = NULL,
                error_handler_path = $12,
                error_handler_args = $13,
                retry = $14
            WHERE
                workspace_id = $10 AND
                path = $11
